# Elevate Your Professional Brand with SuperSifters

Sift’s Customer Advocacy Program, SuperSifters, highlights your success with Sift through a range of activities that promote your company’s commitment to trust and safety.

[see sift in action](/demo/)

![SuperSifters](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/SuperSifters-Hero.png)

## Opportunities to Explore

As a thank you for completing any of the below activities, you’ll receive a custom gift.

Explore the opportunities below and select one or more of the options in the form, along with your name and email, and someone from the Sift team will follow up with more information and next steps.

![shapes](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20539%20350'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![podcasts-resource](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20200%20200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Live speaking and panelist opportunities

Podcasts, webinars, and conferences that are attended, hosted or sponsored by Sift.

![Blog and social media posts](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Blog and social media posts

Written Q&A, guest articles, social media engagement and promotion, and distribution of Sift content and events to your professional networks.

![Testimonials, case studies, quotes, and media interviews](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Testimonials, case studies, quotes, and media interviews

Detail your experiences and outcomes with Sift, to be published on our website and in external publications.

![onepager-resource\_100x100](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20200%20200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

References

Providing references to fraud prevention industry analysts and/or referrals to potential Sift customers.

Become a SuperSifter

Thank you, we will be in contact soon.
